title: Elite South Texas - Resinous & Epoxy Floor Protective Coatings
content:
Elite South Texas - Resinous & Epoxy Floor Protective Coatings
Skip to content
Manufacturer of specialty concrete flooring and resinous floor coating products, including: epoxy resin, urethane, polyaspartic, urethane cement, self-leveler and more. We specialize in fluid-applied flooring, decorative concrete surfaces, and concrete surface restoration. Whether you’re seeking durable industrial epoxy flooring or unique commercial epoxy floor coating designs, we have resin flooring solutions to meet your project requirements.
